channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA selects four Moon missions for permanent base
item.description: NASA awards nearly $600 million for four commercial Moon landings planned for late 2028 to build a lunar base.

item.title: Yale scientists discover hidden network inside the eye
item.description: Researchers find that the retina uses an unexpected communication network allowing separate visual pathways to cooperate.

item.title: NASA's Perseverance rover completes a marathon on Mars
item.description: NASA's Perseverance rover reached a milestone on Mars, driving 26.2 miles (42.195 kilometers), the equivalent of a full marathon.

item.title: New dark matter theory may address multiple cosmic puzzles
item.description: A new study suggests dark matter could be more complex than previously thought, possibly consisting of at least two different types of particles.
